# Clorefy — AI Document Generator

> Clorefy is an AI-powered platform that generates professional invoices, contracts, quotations, and proposals from natural language descriptions. It supports 11 countries with automatic tax compliance.

## Key Features
- AI document generation from plain text descriptions
- Invoices, contracts, quotations, and proposals
- GST (India), VAT (EU/UK), Sales Tax (US) compliance
- PDF, DOCX, and image export
- Digital signatures with token-based access
- Multi-currency support (INR, USD, GBP, EUR, CAD, AUD, SGD, AED, PHP)
- Business profile auto-fill from onboarding

## Supported Countries
India, USA, UK, Germany, Canada, Australia, Singapore, UAE, Philippines, France, Netherlands

## Pricing
- Free: 3 documents/month
- Starter: $9.99/month — 50 documents
- Pro: $24.99/month — 150 documents
- Agency: $59.99/month — Unlimited documents

- Website: https://clorefy.com
